compiled_state.title: Add CI config keys and confidence-gated workflow selection to onboarding SKILL.md Phase 3 Step 2b
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Extend onboarding SKILL.md Phase 3 Step 2b config template to include CI detection-backed keys populated from project-detect.sh output.

### Changes to SKILL.md

1. **Config template extension**: Add ci.fast_gate_job, ci.fast_fail_job, ci.test_ceil_job, ci.integration_workflow to the Required Config Keys section, populated from project-detect.sh ci_workflow_names output.

2. **Config keys table update**: Update the Additional Categories table (lines 1104-1114) to include the 4 new CI keys under the ci category.

3. **Confidence-gated CI workflow selection dialogue**: Add a numbered selection dialogue when ci_workflow_confidence=low OR ci_workflow_names contains 2+ comma-separated entries. When ci_workflow_confidence=high and exactly one entry, skip the CI clarification question entirely.

4. **Populate ci.integration_workflow**: Set from ci_workflow_names detected value (integration workflow filename).

### Source Data
project-detect.sh already emits: ci_workflow_names (comma-separated), ci_workflow_confidence (high|low). These keys already exist in validate-config.sh KNOWN_KEYS.

### E2E Rationale
SKILL.md is agent instructions, not executable code. Structural assertions (test-onboarding-skill.sh) are the appropriate coverage level per the existing test pattern. Full onboarding E2E is not feasible at task level.

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests pass (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] Lint passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Format check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] SKILL.md references ci.fast_gate_job
  Verify: grep -q "ci.fast_gate_job" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references ci.fast_fail_job
  Verify: grep -q "ci.fast_fail_job" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references ci.test_ceil_job
  Verify: grep -q "ci.test_ceil_job" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references ci.integration_workflow
  Verify: grep -q "ci.integration_workflow" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md contains ci_workflow_confidence gating logic
  Verify: grep -q "ci_workflow_confidence" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (already present in test-onboarding-skill.sh as RED tests: test_ci_config_key_coverage and test_ci_workflow_confidence_gating) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
